name: AREthRegisterCallback
title: AREthRegisterCallback
syntax: LONG AREthRegisterCallback( dword objHandle, char callbackName[] );
description: Enables to register/unregister a CAPL callback function for an object which has been created separately.

parameters.name: objHandle
parameters.description: Handle of an already existing AUTOSAR Eth IL object for which a new CAPL callback function should be registered/unregistered . The following objects and their corresponding callbacks are supported: Provided events (<OnAREthPrepareEvent>) Provided methods (<OnAREthMethodRequest>) Consumed events (<OnAREthEventReceived>) Consumed fields (<OnAREthFieldNotification>) Consumed methods (<OnAREthMethodResponse>)

parameters.name: callbackName
parameters.description: The name of the new callback function to register.If a callback function was already registered, it is first unregistered and then replaced by the new one.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
